textByHash.09e1166e2798fc848be89bbe78c697b0cbe75cb8: Mind, this trip could take a few minutes! Are you sure you're ready to go as well?
textByHash.241e8120fbea630f1911a1b109a2429e8e9cfdda: Er, hold on! There's something wrong!
textByHash.288a1f47eead622db7d8b48452adc60c3036e78b: Do you have any gold ore that you want me to take to the bank in the city?
textByHash.329ce7e80462f5a3c9ff575780f857426849c6af: Let's see, if I take that to the bank for you, I'd keep for myself and bring to the bank for you. Does that sound fair?
textByHash.5b0bb691766e1f8b8ca4129a67a8cf5179120dfb: Look, there's the statue of King Alvis, guarding the entrance to Keldagrim!
textByHash.5f7b39fc04c33fbe3aaa00f93346d6df4c292e61: Excellent, it's been good doing business with you!
textByHash.67c57eedd346c229d29c8accec55d03dd025ad56: Hey, it was only a little accident! Calm down!
textByHash.8215f97bd01e463fbfa4337321fd28b67f61887a: That wouldn't do you much good, I'm afraid. My minimum fee is one piece of gold ore, there wouldn't be anything left for you.
textByHash.889bf92838b2bdaf56227f3f7e4be518cad69ca1: Excellent, it's been good doing business with you! I'll take these to the city with my next shipment.
textByHash.89bb1a298862c2fb08179adfe53336801c417005: Alright. Tell you what, I'll only keep for myself and bring ores to the bank for you. Deal?
textByHash.94aa58c803a6a91a3b2fc43c349fb6b69d3a3f9a: Excellent! I'm just waiting for my ship to arrive and then we can go.
textByHash.9a5510802546a7f915c5fa415806a714d99833bf: Well, let's not waste any more time then!
textByHash.a762a2fff91fbc83b458437563433436e784bb63: Calm down, calm down! You got what you paid for the trip, didn't you?
textByHash.b55f3abbe6f721a3061720e6cc71af8c7fe235cc: I don't know... it's just what Dondakan told me, if someone wanted me to ship their gold.
textByHash.b892bfbc4567c05051df9aad6404c202eeee51cc: Are you sure you have enough space in your bank account for that?
textByHash.b8c6ff8a39ddb39edb72a22a5892a4bfd8d5f4a7: Ho there! Want to take a ride with me?
textByHash.bce6ccbaaaa9f8836994d74239d349bc08d9142e: Hello again! Want to go back to Keldagrim?
textByHash.be9ef088c20251b538292939a9e10d1f9d04fabd: Sure, sure! Come back when you need to!
textByHash.c29cd3409cc95f6c910c836a26c1467bca70b4bb: No no, that's what the ferryman is for! I'm going to Keldagrim, my home!
textByHash.cde3149266ea388bd2188e4cf8b25fc6a55cab74: For a human like you, I can do it for free!
textByHash.cfa9b85518e4214006faa24ecada6d6b7d0480e6: Want me to take you back to the mines?
textByHash.eb5389f7ad9c1553ed272a0f35c1addbbcb17bb7: Hey now, it was only a slight accident!
